query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.productLane, p.projectState, p.sector, p.priority, p.stageCode, p.value,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.rejectedAt IS NULL THEN 1 END) as sr_count
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.priority IN ('hot','warm')
  AND p.geoBlockedReason IS NULL
  AND (p.projectState = 'WA' OR p.projectState IS NULL)
  AND (p.productLane IS NULL OR p.productLane NOT IN ('bess','pal','pumps'))
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.productLane, p.projectState, p.sector, p.priority, p.stageCode, p.value
HAVING sr_count >= 1
ORDER BY CASE p.priority WHEN 'hot' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, sr_count DESC
LIMIT 5;

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.productLane, p.projectState, p.sector, p.priority, p.stageCode, p.value,
  COUNT(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.rejectedAt IS NULL THEN 1 END) as sr_count
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.projectId = p.id
LEFT JOIN contacts c ON c.id = cp.contactId
WHERE p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.priority IN ('hot','warm')
  AND p.geoBlockedReason IS NULL
  AND (p.projectState = 'WA' OR p.projectState IS NULL)
  AND (p.productLane IS NULL OR p.productLane NOT IN ('bess','pal','pumps'))
GROUP BY p.id, p.name, p.productLane, p.projectState, p.sector, p.priority, p.stageCode, p.value
HAVING sr_count >= 1
ORDER BY CASE p.priority WHEN 'hot' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, sr_count DESC
LIMIT 5;
